twitter_thread: ByteDance's AI model generates 30-second videos from single prompts, with 80% accuracy on complex scenarios.
It uses 12 layers of natural language processing and 8 layers of computer vision to analyze prompts.
The model can handle 500 distinct prompts per minute, from simple descriptions to intricate storylines.
For example, a 30-second explainer video that would take 2 hours to produce manually can be generated in 1 minute.
However, this raises concerns: 40% of generated clips may infringe on existing copyrights.
To mitigate this, developers are working on integrating 3rd-party fact-checking APIs and copyright detection tools.
How do you think single-prompt video generation will change the content creation landscape? #aiethics #videoproduction
